name: universal-skills-marketplace
description: Unofficial cross-ecosystem skills marketplace. Context7-pattern MCP server that resolves, fetches, and installs skills from both Claude Code (anthropics/claude-plugins-official, anthropics/skills) and OpenAI Codex (openai/plugins, openai/skills, openai/codex-plugin-cc) — one registry, two clients. Not affiliated with Anthropic or OpenAI.
